steps.title: Set up the equation with the target value
Isolate the exponential term
steps.content:
Subtract 9 from both sides:
$$260 = 260\left(\frac{41}{40}\right)^{t-18}$$
Divide both sides by 260:
$$1 = \left(\frac{41}{40}\right)^{t-18}$$

steps.title: Recognize the exponential property and solve
steps.content:
Any positive base raised to the power of 0 equals 1. Since $\left(\frac{41}{40}\right)^{t-18} = 1$, the exponent must be 0:
$$t - 18 = 0$$
$$t = 18$$
The mollusk population was estimated at 269 in month 18.
